source_section.title_label_raw: Waterfront View Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors

sections.title_label_raw: Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors

provisions.heading_context_raw: Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: The Halifax and Dartmouth waterfront view corridors are as set out and shown on the following schedules:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: Schedule 29: Morris Street Waterfront View Corridor;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: Schedule 30: Bishop Street Waterfront View Corridor;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: Schedule 31: Salter Street Waterfront View Corridor;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: Schedule 32: Sackville Street Waterfront View Corridor;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: Schedule 33: Prince Street Waterfront View Corridor;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: Schedule 34: George Street Waterfront View Corridor;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: Schedule 35: Best Street Waterfront View Corridor;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: Schedule 36: Mott Street Waterfront View Corridor;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: Schedule 37: Church Street Waterfront View Corridor;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: Schedule 38: North Street Waterfront View Corridor;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: Schedule 39: Ochterloney Street Waterfront View Corridor;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: Schedule 40: Queen Street Waterfront View Corridor;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: Schedule 41: Portland Street Waterfront View Corridor;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: Schedule 42: Prince Street Waterfront View Corridor;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: Schedule 43: Kings Wharf Place Waterfront View Corridor;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: Schedule 44: Canal Street Waterfront View Corridor;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: Schedule 45: Maitland Street Waterfront View Corridor;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: Schedule 46: Old Ferry Road Waterfront View Corridor; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: Schedule 47: Parker Street Waterfront View Corridor.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: A structure shall not be erected, constructed, altered, reconstructed, or located so that it protrudes into a required waterfront view corridor, except:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: within the DH zone, any portion of a structure at or below the streetline grade where a waterfront view corridor intersects with Lower Water Street;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: uncovered structures less than 0.6 metre in height, such as balconies, patios, and planters;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: structures containing temporary uses;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: structures containing temporary construction uses;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: within the Dartmouth Waterfront (DW) Special Area, as shown on Schedule 3A, and the Halifax Waterfront (HW) Special Area, as shown on Schedule 3B, accessory structures and kiosks that are no greater than:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: 20.0 square metres in floor area, or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: 3.0 metres in height;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: within the Dartmouth Waterfront (DW) Special Area, as shown on Schedule 3A, and the Halifax Waterfront (HW) Special Area, as shown on Schedule 3B, shipping containers that are no greater than 3.0 metres in height;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: public art;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: fountains and other landscaping features;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: monuments;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: commemorative signs; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: signs regulating traffic on a lot, including directional signage.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Corridors Halifax and Dartmouth Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: Driving aisles for motor vehicles are permitted within any waterfront view corridor. Waterfront View Corridors in the DH Zone

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsections 402(2) and 402(3), where any main

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 402(2) and 402(3), where any main
provisions.text: Subject to Subsections 402(2) and 402(3), where any main building in the DH zone abuts a waterfront view corridor established in Section 401, there shall be no dwelling units permitted on the ground floor abutting the waterfront view corridor.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 402(2) and 402(3), where any main
provisions.text: Residential pedestrian entrances and lobbies are permitted on a ground floor.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 402(2) and 402(3), where any main
provisions.text: Any main building is considered to abut a waterfront view corridor if it is located within 10.0 metres of the edge of a waterfront view corridor. Facilities
